description.en:
This mod adds extra tyre tracks to vehicles for more realistic behaviour in forested areas. It was originally created for heavy tracked machines, but the functionality has been extended to all wheeled and tracked vehicles.
The mod is enabled globally, but disabled per vehicle by default.
All credit goes to kenny456 for the original mod; I (DiscoFlower8890) only converted it to work with the latest version of the game.
Features: - Enable/disable the mod for the current vehicle (the setting is saved to the config file and applies across all savegames) - Enable/disable the mod globally for all vehicles - Only administrators can change global settings in multiplayer - All controls can be remapped in Input Bindings
Default controls: - Left Alt + T — Toggle mod for current vehicle - Left Ctrl + T — Toggle mod globally for all vehicles
For bugs or other issues, message me on Discord: <@412286849122435083>

text.name: input_DIRTYTIRETRACK_ACTIVATE_ALL
text.en: Dirty Tire Tracks: Activate / deactivate for all vehicles
text.de: Dirty Tire Tracks: Für alle Fahrzeuge aktivieren / deaktivieren
text.sv: Dirty Tire Tracks: Aktivera / Avaktivera på alla fordon

text.name: DIRTYTIRETRACK_ACTIVATE_ALL
text.en: Dirty Tire Tracks: Turn on for all vehicles
text.de: Dirty Tire Tracks: Für alle Fahrzeuge einschalten
text.sv: Dirty Tire Tracks: Aktivera på alla fordon

text.name: DIRTYTIRETRACK_DEACTIVATE_ALL
text.en: Dirty Tire Tracks: Turn off for all vehicles
text.de: Dirty Tire Tracks: Für alle Fahrzeuge ausschalten
text.sv: Dirty Tire Tracks: Stäng av på alla fordon
